text.title: SLO Definition Template Per Service Class Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and a forbidden-pattern list.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Missing required fields and contains forbidden patterns; validator rejects.

list.item: sli_query measures resource utilisation for a user-facing service class
sli_query is an inline PromQL (not a recording-rule reference)

text.reference: Validator script enforcing required keys + forbidden patterns
